# Galley Editor LLM Documentation

Galley Editor is a React Markdown editor built on CodeMirror 6. Use these plain Markdown files for machine-readable documentation.

- Complete guide: ./llms/complete-guide.md
- Human documentation site: ./
- API reference: ./reference/api/
- Plugins and renderers: ./guides/plugins-renderers/
- Customization: ./guides/customization/

The complete guide covers custom commands, renderers, toolbar buttons, toolbar icons, styling, themes, built-in commands, supporting actions, and app-owned file upload tracking.
